title: rubus chrysoxylon
intro: Rubus chrysoxylon, also known as the golden raspberry or yellow raspberry, is a type of plant in the rose family that produces yellow or golden berries. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to reduce pain and improve overall health. The health benefits of Rubus chrysoxylon include its potential to support the immune system, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in the digestion of food. Rubus chrysoxylon can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried powder, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
